items.title: Rashad relates to Wemby's monk training 🤣
items.author: The Arena
items.body_excerpt: Gil's Arena's Rashad McCants talks about the greatness of Victor Wembanyama and how him going to over to China to train with the monks, as well as train with NBA greats like Kevin Garnett and Hakeem Olajuwon makes Wemby so special and different from his NBA peers. The Arena…
